things.name: National Museum of Ethiopia
things.description: Home to Lucy - the 3.2-million-year-old Australopithecus fossil that rewrote human history

things.name: Ethnological Museum (Haile Selassie Palace)
things.description: Emperor's former bedroom and throne room in a museum of Ethiopian culture

things.name: Lalibela Rock Churches Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 13 rock-hewn churches carved from solid rock in the 12th century

things.name: Holy Trinity Cathedral
things.description: Ethiopia's most important Orthodox church with the tombs of Haile Selassie and his wife

things.name: Merkato Market
things.description: Africa's largest open-air market covering several square kilometres

things.name: African Union Headquarters
things.description: Controversial China-built headquarters of the AU with free tours of the main hall

things.name: Axum Day Trip
things.description: Ancient obelisks and the claimed home of the Ark of the Covenant

things.name: Ethiopian Coffee Ceremony
things.description: Roasting, grinding and brewing coffee in the ritual three-round ceremony

things.name: Addis Ababa Entoto Hills
things.description: Forest and church on the hills above the city where Menelik II established his capital

things.name: Injera and Tibs at Yod Abyssinia
things.description: Traditional Ethiopian feast with sour injera flatbread and spiced lamb tibs with cultural show
